summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 105 P1/P2 features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Retirement Planner with Import from Net Worth and Check Age Pension buttons working correctly. New backend routes: client_wealth_data, age_pension, multi_tenant all registered and functional.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - localStorage persistence issue noted in previous iteration

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1/P2 features tested and working. Backend routes: /api/wealth-data/*, /api/age-pension/*, /api/tenants/* all functional. Frontend Retirement Planner at /retirement has Import from Net Worth and Check Age Pension buttons that call backend APIs successfully. Compliance modal may block UI testing - press Escape to dismiss.

client_wealth_data_api.GET /api/wealth-data/snapshot/demo_clien: PASS - Returns demo client data with assets, liabilities, incomes, people
client_wealth_data_api.GET /api/wealth-data/entities: PASS - Returns 5 entity types (personal, joint, company, trust, smsf) with CGT discounts
client_wealth_data_api.GET /api/wealth-data/asset-types: PASS - Returns 11 asset types with default yields

age_pension_api.GET /api/age-pension/rates: PASS - Returns current pension rates, thresholds, deeming rates
age_pension_api.GET /api/age-pension/qualifying-age/{bir: PASS - Returns correct qualifying age (67 for 1980, 65 for 1952)
age_pension_api.POST /api/age-pension/calculate: PASS - Calculates eligibility correctly for both eligible and not-yet-eligible persons

multi_tenant_api.POST /api/tenants/demo/setup: PASS - Creates demo tenant LIC-DEMO0001 with 2 advisers
multi_tenant_api.GET /api/tenants/licensees: PASS - Returns list of licensees (15 total)
multi_tenant_api.GET /api/tenants/advisers: PASS - Returns list of advisers for current tenant

document_generation_api.GET /api/documents/: PASS - Returns document list (3 sample documents)

frontend_retirement_planner.import_from_net_worth_button: PASS - Button visible and functional, calls /api/wealth-data/snapshot/demo_client
frontend_retirement_planner.check_age_pension_button: PASS - Button visible and functional, calls /api/age-pension/calculate
frontend_retirement_planner.seven_tabs: PASS - Overview, People, Assets, Income, Expenses, Assumptions, Projection tabs present
frontend_retirement_planner.summary_cards: PASS - Net Worth, Total Assets, Total Liabilities, Annual Income, Years to Retirement, Monthly Expenses
frontend_retirement_planner.assets_by_entity_chart: PASS - Shows Personal, Joint, Company, Family Trust, SMSF breakdown
frontend_retirement_planner.retirement_timeline: PASS - Shows Current Age, Retirement, Age Pension Eligible, Planning Horizon

navigation.retirement_link: PASS - Retirement link visible in sidebar under DASHBOARD section

mocked_apis.note: Email/SMS/Push notifications are mocked (logging to DB) as noted in review request
